title: Multimarket Contact in the Hospital Industry

construct_vars: df <- df %>% dplyr::left_join(gvar_tbl, by='h') %>% dplyr::mutate(gvar_CS = ifelse(!is.na(first_post), as.numeric(first_post), 0))

notes: EVENT STUDY REVIEWED. All 5 estimators converge. Stable positive effect ~0.05-0.07. Slight pre-trend drift at h=-4. Schmitt (2018). Stata: areg lnprnonmed post lncmi pctmcaid lnbeds fp hhi sysoth i.year [aw=dis_tot], absorb(h) cluster(h) if indirect==0. Staggered adoption: different hospitals treated in different years (2000-2010). 347 treated, 3032 never-treated. Outcome = log non-medical hospital prices. SENSITIVITY: CS-NT+fp+sysoth (binary dummies) improves pre-trends relative to unconditional CS-NT — use in discussion chapter to illustrate when controls help. | LESSON 7 CASE (2026-04-19, AMPLIFY variant): 6th canonical Spec A behavior. Paper-auditor EXACT (0.25%). Spec A (CS+6 direct-level ctrls, staggered): status=OK, ATT=0.093 (+57% magnitude vs unconditional CS=0.059). Direction preserved, just magnified. Contrasts with: 125 Levine (6 RCS individual) which inflates 9× and crosses significance (Pattern 51); 79 Carpenter (53 direct staggered) which collapses to 0; 335 Le Moglie (18 direct single) collapses; 358 Bargain (30 direct 2×2) collapses; 47 Clemens (15 direct single) collapses. Paper 60 shows moderate-count (6) direct-level controls in staggered panel can AMPLIFY rather than collapse or inflate — intermediate regime. Bacon TVU 93.8% (clean). Pre-trend t=-4 coef=-0.059 (t≈1) borderline. HonestDiD D-FRAGILE (Mbar=0.25 break); design-signal not implementation.
